title: Fix std::randomize() in static function with static class members

features.name: class with static queue member
features.description: Code should include a class with a static queue-typed member variable

features.name: static class function with std::randomize and with clause
features.description: Code should include a static class function containing std::randomize() with a with clause that references static class members

features.name: std::randomize with inside operator on static class queue
features.description: Code should include std::randomize() with a with clause using inside operator to constrain against a static class queue member
